title: Xtra Garlicky Kenyan Lamb Wrap
description: A garlicky and gooey Kenyan dish featuring sage, wrapped in a corn husk, perfect for a rainy day. This kosher-friendly recipe is a unique twist on traditional Kenyan cuisine.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 300 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, mix together the lamb, garlic, sage, onion, salt, and pepper.
Lay a corn husk flat and place one quarter of the lamb mixture in the center.
Brush the edges of the corn husk with olive oil and fold the husk over the filling to form a triangle or square shape.
Repeat with the remaining corn husks and lamb mixture.
Place the wraps on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and bake for 25 minutes.
Increase the oven temperature to 375 degrees Fahrenheit and continue baking for an additional 10 minutes.
Remove the wraps from the oven and let them cool for a few minutes before serving.
